title: React Pricing Toggle Card

statement.markdown:
## React Pricing Card with Billing Toggle

Build a SaaS Pricing Card component with an interactive billing frequency toggle (Monthly vs Annual).

### Requirements:
1. **Interactive Toggle**: Toggle switch between `"Monthly"` and `"Annual"` billing. Selecting Annual applies a 20% discount visually.
2. **Pricing Plans**: Display 3 price tiers (Basic, Pro, Enterprise) each with plan names, price values, feature lists, and dynamic checkout callbacks.
3. **Featured Tier Badge**: Highlight the Pro plan card visually as the "Most Popular" choice with special borders and checkmark badge colors.

constraints: Must style layers with Tailwind CSS

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive props, callbacks, and element structures work cleanly.
Verify state structure designs and clean Tailwind CSS layouts.
